description:
Chinese street food is amazing! Also see: https://youtu.be/2sSADpmM-L4   

China is a food paradise and in this full documentary we are traveling through China's silk road region to uncover the best Chinese street food across the country - from Xi'an to Lanzhou! Get ready for the most amazing Chinese food ever! 

We're eating some of the most famous Chinese foods from Xi'an that you may have heard of like hand pulled noodles and Chinese bbq.  But we'll also go deep into China's incredible culture and eat everything from Chinese breakfast dishes like baozi and jianbing pancakes, to lesser known specialties like big plate chicken (dapanji) and more! 

Watch the full China food series here (Silk road): https://youtu.be/o7RkF6kxphI

👉 Subscribe for more food videos: https://youtube.com/thefoodranger
https://youtube.com/thefoodranger
https://instagram.com/thefoodranger
https://facebook.com/thefoodranger
tags: street food vendors around the world.
fulltitle: I Exposed China’s Most Extreme Street Food!!
